contentBlocks.original:
शिव गायत्री मन्त्रः
ओ-न्तत्पुरु॑षाय वि॒द्महे॑ महादे॒वाय॑ धीमहि ।
तन्नो॑ रुद्रः प्रचो॒दया᳚त् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
śiva gāyatrī mantraḥ
ō-ntatpuru̍ṣāya vi̠dmahē̍ mahādē̠vāya̍ dhīmahi ।
tannō̍ rudraḥ prachō̠dayā̎t ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Shiva Gayatri: Om — we know the Supreme Person (Tatpurusha); we meditate on Mahadeva (the Great God). May Rudra inspire and illuminate us.

contentBlocks.original:
गणपति गायत्री मन्त्रः
ओ-न्तत्पुरु॑षाय वि॒द्महे॑ वक्रतु॒ण्डाय॑ धीमहि ।
तन्नो॑ दन्तिः प्रचो॒दया᳚त् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
gaṇapati gāyatrī mantraḥ
ō-ntatpuru̍ṣāya vi̠dmahē̍ vakratu̠ṇḍāya̍ dhīmahi ।
tannō̍ dantiḥ prachō̠dayā̎t ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Ganapati Gayatri: Om — we know the Supreme Person; we meditate on Vakratunda (the curved-trunk one). May the tusked lord (Danti) inspire and illuminate us.

contentBlocks.original:
नन्दि गायत्री मन्त्रः
ओ-न्तत्पुरु॑षाय वि॒द्महे॑ चक्रतु॒ण्डाय॑ धीमहि ।
तन्नो॑ नन्दिः प्रचो॒दया᳚त् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
nandi gāyatrī mantraḥ
ō-ntatpuru̍ṣāya vi̠dmahē̍ chakratu̠ṇḍāya̍ dhīmahi ।
tannō̍ nandiḥ prachō̠dayā̎t ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Nandi Gayatri: Om — we know the Supreme Person; we meditate on Chakratunda (the wheel-snouted one). May Nandi inspire and illuminate us.

contentBlocks.original:
सुब्रह्मण्य गायत्री मन्त्रः
ओ-न्तत्पुरु॑षाय वि॒द्महे॑ महासे॒नाय॑ धीमहि ।
तन्न-ष्षण्मुखः प्रचो॒दया᳚त् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
subrahmaṇya gāyatrī mantraḥ
ō-ntatpuru̍ṣāya vi̠dmahē̍ mahāsē̠nāya̍ dhīmahi ।
tanna-ṣṣaṇmukhaḥ prachō̠dayā̎t ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Subrahmanya Gayatri: Om — we know the Supreme Person; we meditate on Mahasena (the great commander). May the six-faced lord (Shanmukha) inspire and illuminate us.

contentBlocks.original:
गरुड गायत्री मन्त्रः
ओ-न्तत्पुरु॑षाय वि॒द्महे॑ सुवर्णप॒क्षाय॑ धीमहि ।
तन्नो॑ गरुडः प्रचो॒दया᳚त् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
garuḍa gāyatrī mantraḥ
ō-ntatpuru̍ṣāya vi̠dmahē̍ suvarṇapa̠kṣāya̍ dhīmahi ।
tannō̍ garuḍaḥ prachō̠dayā̎t ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Garuda Gayatri: Om — we know the Supreme Person; we meditate on the golden-winged one (Suvarnna Paksha). May Garuda inspire and illuminate us.

contentBlocks.original:
ब्रह्म गायत्री मन्त्रः
ॐ-वेँ॒दा॒त्म॒नाय॑ वि॒द्महे॑ हिरण्यग॒र्भाय॑ धीमहि ।
तन्नो॑ ब्रह्मः प्रचो॒दया᳚त् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
brahma gāyatrī mantraḥ
ōṃ vē̠dā̠tma̠nāya̍ vi̠dmahē̍ hiraṇyaga̠rbhāya̍ dhīmahi ।
tannō̍ brahmaḥ prachō̠dayā̎t ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Brahma Gayatri: Om — we know the self of the Vedas (Vedatma); we meditate on Hiranyagarbha (the golden womb of creation). May Brahma inspire and illuminate us.

contentBlocks.original:
विष्णु गायत्री मन्त्रः
ओ-न्ना॒रा॒य॒णाय॑ वि॒द्महे॑ वासुदे॒वाय॑ धीमहि ।
तन्नो॑ विष्णुः प्रचो॒दया᳚त् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
viṣṇu gāyatrī mantraḥ
ō-nnā̠rā̠ya̠ṇāya̍ vi̠dmahē̍ vāsudē̠vāya̍ dhīmahi ।
tannō̍ viṣṇuḥ prachō̠dayā̎t ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Vishnu Gayatri: Om — we know Narayana (the all-pervading one); we meditate on Vasudeva (the indwelling lord). May Vishnu inspire and illuminate us.

contentBlocks.original:
श्री लक्ष्मि गायत्री मन्त्रः
ओ-म्म॒हा॒दे॒व्यै च वि॒द्महे॑ विष्णुप॒त्नी च॑ धीमहि ।
तन्नो॑ लक्ष्मी प्रचो॒दया᳚त् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
śrī lakṣmi gāyatrī mantraḥ
ō-mma̠hā̠dē̠vyai cha vi̠dmahē̍ viṣṇupa̠tnī cha̍ dhīmahi ।
tannō̍ lakṣmī prachō̠dayā̎t ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Sri Lakshmi Gayatri: Om — we know the great goddess (Mahadevi); we meditate on the consort of Vishnu (Vishnupatni). May Lakshmi inspire and illuminate us.

contentBlocks.original:
नरसिंह गायत्री मन्त्रः
ॐ-वँ॒ज्र॒न॒खाय वि॒द्महे॑ तीक्ष्णद॒ग्ग्-ष्ट्राय॑ धीमहि ।
तन्नो॑ नारसिग्ंहः प्रचो॒दया᳚त् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
narasiṃha gāyatrī mantraḥ
ōṃ va̠jra̠na̠khāya vi̠dmahē̍ tīkṣṇada̠gg-ṣṭrāya̍ dhīmahi ।
tannō̍ nārasigṃhaḥ prachō̠dayā̎t ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Narasimha Gayatri: Om — we know the one with thunderbolt nails (Vajranakha); we meditate on the one with sharp fangs (Tikshnadamshtra). May Narasimha inspire and illuminate us.

contentBlocks.original:
सूर्य गायत्री मन्त्रः
ओ-म्भा॒स्क॒राय॑ वि॒द्महे॑ महद्द्युतिक॒राय॑ धीमहि ।
तन्नो॑ आदित्यः प्रचो॒दया᳚त् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sūrya gāyatrī mantraḥ
ō-mbhā̠ska̠rāya̍ vi̠dmahē̍ mahaddyutika̠rāya̍ dhīmahi ।
tannō̍ ādityaḥ prachō̠dayā̎t ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Surya Gayatri: Om — we know Bhaskara (the sun, maker of light); we meditate on the great radiance-giver (Mahaddyutikara). May Aditya inspire and illuminate us.

contentBlocks.original:
अग्नि गायत्री मन्त्रः
ॐ-वैँ॒श्वा॒न॒राय॑ वि॒द्महे॑ लाली॒लाय धीमहि ।
तन्नो॑ अग्निः प्रचो॒दया᳚त् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
agni gāyatrī mantraḥ
ōṃ vai̠śvā̠na̠rāya̍ vi̠dmahē̍ lālī̠lāya dhīmahi ।
tannō̍ agniḥ prachō̠dayā̎t ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Agni Gayatri: Om — we know Vaishvanara (the universal fire); we meditate on the flaming one (Lalilaya). May Agni inspire and illuminate us.

contentBlocks.original:
दुर्गा गायत्री मन्त्रः
ओ-ङ्का॒त्या॒य॒नाय॑ वि॒द्महे॑ कन्यकु॒मारि॑ धीमहि ।
तन्नो॑ दुर्गिः प्रचो॒दया᳚त् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
durgā gāyatrī mantraḥ
ō-ṅkā̠tyā̠ya̠nāya̍ vi̠dmahē̍ kanyaku̠māri̍ dhīmahi ।
tannō̍ durgiḥ prachō̠dayā̎t ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Durga Gayatri: Om — we know Katyayana (daughter of sage Katyayana); we meditate on Kanyakumari (the eternal virgin goddess). May Durgi inspire and illuminate us.
